= IKE Documentation Example

A documentation-only project demonstrating the full IKE
AsciiDoc pipeline.
This module exercises all diagram types,
Koncept macros,
typography features,
and layout options across all six PDF renderers.

== Purpose

This project serves as both a test fixture and a reference
implementation.
It verifies that the pipeline handles every supported feature
correctly and provides authors with working examples to copy from.

== Features Demonstrated

* PlantUML, Mermaid, and Ditaa diagrams via Kroki
* `k:ConceptName[]` Koncept inline macros with auto-generated glossary
* Admonition blocks (NOTE, TIP, WARNING, CAUTION, IMPORTANT)
* Source code listings with syntax highlighting
* Tables with complex formatting
* Cross-references and bibliography
* Custom IKE theme styling

== Building

[source,bash]
----
# HTML only:
mvn clean verify -pl doc-example

# With Prawn PDF:
mvn clean verify -pl doc-example -Dike.pdf.prawn

# All renderers:
mvn clean verify -pl doc-example -Dike.pdf.prawn -Dike.pdf.fop -Dike.pdf.prince
----

== Output

* HTML: `target/generated-docs/html/index.html`
* PDF: `target/generated-docs/pdf-{renderer}/doc-example.pdf`
